FIntEdpStoreClicksDetectorThrottlingHund.purpose: Enhances performance by making the game run smoother during heavy click events.

FFlagFoundationPopoverOverflow_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the display of pop-up menus to prevent them from overflowing off-screen.
FFlagFoundationPopoverOverflow_Staged.purpose: Ensures players can see all options in pop-ups without them being cut off.

FFlagPTFKeyboardReceiveKeyEvents.mechanism: Enables the game to properly receive and process keyboard input events.
FFlagPTFKeyboardReceiveKeyEvents.purpose: Improves gameplay by allowing players to use keyboard shortcuts effectively.

FFlagFoundationPopoverNegateAlignOffsetO.mechanism: Corrects the alignment of pop-ups when they flip direction.
FFlagFoundationPopoverNegateAlignOffsetO.purpose: Ensures pop-ups are correctly positioned for better user experience.

DFFlagHttpUrlStats_Staged.mechanism: Enables tracking of HTTP requests to URLs for performance analysis.
DFFlagHttpUrlStats_Staged.purpose: Helps improve game performance by analyzing how external links are used.
